extracted.summary: Results-driven Mechanical Engineer with 4+ years of progressive experience spanning audiovisual systems engineering, site mechanical supervision, and QA/QC inspection across Saudi Arabia's industrial and commercial sectors. Proven track record delivering projects for Aramco contractors, enforcing ISO/ASME/API compliance, and designing integrated AV solutions that accelerate operational decision-making. Licensed member of the Saudi Council of Engineers with NEBOSH IGC certification.

achievements: Senior Design Project — Winner: Led multidisciplinary team in designing and implementing a process-optimization solution for Dickies Seafood Company (Richmond, VA), selected as top project in graduating class.
Research Internship — Smart Lab Materials: Conducted hands-on investigation of advanced material behavior under varied loading conditions.
Engineering Visualization: Designed and modeled a full 3D industrial tank assembly in SolidWorks, producing manufacturing-ready drawings.

experience.title: Audiovisual Engineer
bullets: Design end-to-end AV system architectures—audio, video, lighting, and control—integrating each layer with enterprise networks and unified control platforms for corporate and commercial clients.
Install, configure, and commission LED video walls, digital signage, conferencing codecs, microphones, and speaker arrays across smart meeting rooms, boardrooms, and large-format venues.

Engineered a real-time heartbeat visualization system for a medical training manikin by integrating EMS telemetry with live charting dashboards, enabling medical teams to interpret vitals and make clinical decisions 3× faster.
Collaborate with IT, facilities, and client stakeholders to translate functional requirements into signal-flow drawings, equipment schedules, and handover documentation.
Perform preventive maintenance, fault diagnosis, and firmware upgrades to sustain uptime across deployed AV estates.

experience.title: Site Mechanical Engineer
bullets: Supervised mechanical installation works on Aramco-affiliated drilling sites, enforcing conformance to approved engineering drawings, HSE regulations, and Aramco engineering standards.
Inspected and cleared site conditions prior to drilling mobilization—verifying ground stability, equipment readiness, and safety barriers—to prevent schedule slippage and incident risk.
Coordinated daily between civil, electrical, instrumentation teams, subcontractors, and suppliers to resolve interface clashes and maintain construction sequencing.
Reviewed and interpreted mechanical drawings, isometrics, P&IDs, and technical specifications; issued daily and weekly progress reports to project management.
Verified material deliveries against specifications and logged non-conformance reports (NCRs) for corrective action.

experience.title: QA/QC Engineer
bullets: Enforced project-wide compliance with ISO 9001, ASME, and API standards across vendor facilities and client project sites, documenting findings in structured inspection reports.
Developed and implemented best-practice QA/QC procedures for product development and lifting equipment certification, reducing rework on flagged items.
Conducted load testing, visual inspection, and NDT coordination for mobile cranes, offshore containers, shackles, eyebolts, and all classes of lifting slings prior to release for service.
Audited vendor workshops and field installations, issuing non-conformance reports and verifying timely close-out of corrective actions.
Reviewed ITPs, WPS/PQRs, and material test certificates to validate traceability before equipment deployment.

certifications.name: NEBOSH International General Certificate (IGC) in Occupational Health and Safety
ISO Internal Auditor — Quality Management Systems

achievements: Delivered a medical-manikin heartbeat visualization system with live EMS integration that reduced clinical decision time by 3×.
Awarded top Senior Design Project at Old Dominion University for process optimization work at Dickies Seafood Company.
Certified by the Saudi Council of Engineers, qualifying for supervisory engineering roles across the Kingdom's regulated projects.
